displayName.zh_CN: 邮递员 - 一键发送文档邮件

description.default: Send SiYuan documents as email (body or attachment) via SMTP.
description.en_US: Send SiYuan documents as email (body or attachment) via SMTP. Supports QQ, 163, 189, 139 and custom SMTP providers.
description.zh_CN: 通过 SMTP 将思源笔记文档一键发送为邮件（正文或附件），预置支持 QQ、163、189、139 等常用邮箱。
